form:Form.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Workflows.FORM_GROUP.form

form:ComboBox.label: Nombre de la Base de Datos
form:ComboBox.name: d_param_1

form:SButton.label: Eliminar el elemento de la Lista
form:SButton.name: btn_del

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PRO1.c_process, PRO1.d_process from WRK01_PROCESS as PRO1, WRK01_WF as WF join wf.oi_wf INNER PRO1.oi_wf where PRO1.e_automatico=0 AND WF.l_automatica = 0 AND WF.c_wf = {#SOURCE:@d_param_1} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PAR.c_param, PAR.c_type, PAR.c_io from WRK04_PARAMS as PAR, WRK04_INT_MAN as INT join INT.oi_int_mag INNER PAR.oi_int_mag where INT.c_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@d_param_1} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: GRUPOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group, WRK01_GROUPS.c_var_group from WRK01_GROUPS where WRK01_GROUPS.oi_wf={$DATAIN/@oi_workflow} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VARIABLES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK01_VARS.oi_var, WRK01_GROUPS.c_var_group, WRK01_VARS.c_var, WRK01_VARS.d_var, WRK01_VARS.c_type from WRK01_VARS, WRK01_GROUPS where WRK01_VARS.oi_var_group=WRK01_GROUPS.oi_var_group and WRK01_GROUPS.oi_wf={$DATAIN/@oi_workflow} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PARAMETROS-IM
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK04_PARAMS.oi_param, WRK04_PARAMS.c_param, WRK04_PARAMS.d_param, WRK04_PARAMS.c_type from WRK04_PARAMS, WRK04_INT_MAN join WRK04_INT_MAN.oi_int_mag inner WRK04_PARAMS.oi_int_mag where isNull(WRK04_PARAMS.oi_param_x) and WRK04_INT_MAN.c_int_mag={$DATAIN/@im} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: STRUCT
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT.oi_struct, WRK04_PARAMS.c_param, WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT.c_struct, WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT.d_struct, WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT.c_type from WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT, WRK04_PARAMS join WRK04_PARAMS.oi_param inner WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT.oi_param where WRK04_PARAMS.oi_param={$SOURCE/@oi_param} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: PARAMETROS-PROCESS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select PAR.oi_process_param, PAR.c_process_param, PAR.d_process_param, PAR.c_type from WRK01_WF as WF, WRK01_PROCESS as PRO, WRK01_PROCESS_PARAM as PAR join WF.oi_wf inner PRO.oi_wf, PRO.oi_process inner PAR.oi_process where {%?($DATAIN/@oi_process='') {% WF.l_automatica=0 and PRO.e_automatico=0 and WF.c_wf={$DATAIN/@c_wf} and PRO.c_process={$DATAIN/@c_process} %} {% PRO.oi_process={$DATAIN/@oi_process} %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW
